package rulecoverage

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"google.golang.org/grpc"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/codes"
	"google.golang.org/grpc/status"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"io"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// Negative scenario for grpc_large_message_without_streaming: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: unary RPC handlers returning or receiving messages > 4MB (inferred from large slice/struct serialization patterns)
type CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingModel struct {
	ID        string       `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID  string       `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status    string       `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sql   *sql.DB
	cache map[string]CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingModel
}

type CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingService struct {
	repo   *CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingRepository
	client *http.Client
	logger *log.Logger
	cfg    map[string]string
}

type CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingAuditSink interface {
	Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreaming(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreamingDTO) error {
	focus := "grpc_large_message_without_streaming"
	_ = focus

	conn, err := grpc.Dial(input, grpc.WithInsecure())
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer conn.Close()

	stream, err := conn.NewStream(ctx, &grpc.StreamDesc{}, "/example.Service/StreamLargeData")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	chunkSize := 64 * 1024
	for i := 0; i < len(items); i++ {
		data, _ := fmt.Marshal(items[i])
		for offset := 0; offset < len(data); offset += chunkSize {
			end := offset + chunkSize
			if end > len(data) {
				end = len(data)
			}
			if err := stream.SendMsg(&LargeDataChunk{Data: data[offset:end]}); err != nil {
				return err
			}
		}
	}

	for {
		chunk := &LargeDataChunk{}
		if err := stream.RecvMsg(chunk); err == io.EOF {
			break
		} else if err != nil {
			if status.Code(err) == codes.Canceled {
				return nil
			}
			return err
		}
		_ = chunk.Data
	}

	return nil
}

type LargeDataChunk struct {
	Data []byte
}
